log: === INITIATIVE ===

=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 20] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 15 damage. Firbolg — Armored Escapist HP: 44/59
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 20] MISS!
⚡ Firbolg — Armored Escapist casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:7 total 17 vs AC 20 — now MISSES!
--- Firbolg — Armored Escapist's turn ---
Firbolg — Armored Escapist casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Firbolg — Armored Escapist's turn ---
Firbolg — Armored Escapist casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS!
→ Half damage: 7
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 12 damage. Firbolg — Armored Escapist HP: 47/59

→ Concentration save: [15 vs DC 15] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Firbolg — Armored Escapist HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
